sanskrit:
क्षेत्रज्ञं चापि मां विद्धि सर्वक्षेत्रेषु भारत।
क्षेत्रक्षेत्रज्ञयोर्ज्ञानं यत्तज्ज्ञानं मतं मम।।
transliteration:
kṣetrajñaṃ cāpi māṃ viddhi sarvakṣetreṣu bhārata |
kṣetrakṣetrajñayor jñānaṃ yat taj jñānaṃ mataṃ mama ||
literal_meaning: Know Me also as the Knower in all fields, O Bharata; the knowledge of both the field and the knower—this is the knowledge that is My view.
contextual_meaning: True self-awareness includes recognizing two observers within: the personal ego-mind (individual knower) and a trans-personal Witness (Supersoul) that calmly registers all bodies and minds without being any of them. Psychological health arises when one can distinguish these two levels of knowing rather than fusing or confusing them.
psychological_state: Metacognitive insight—observing the observer without collapsing into solipsism or dissociation.
trigger_scenario: During mindfulness practice you notice both the anxious narrator in your head and a quieter awareness that simply sees the anxiety; realizing the quieter presence is always intact regardless of mood.
anchor_text: Notice the quiet watcher behind every thought; that is the true Knower.
